title: ThDilos Fox Origin Expanded
description: Provide evolutions for my basic fox origin
body:
# **Hello**~~wo~~

This ~~mod~~ adds **5 LATE GAME** evolutions for my [default fox origin](https://modrinth.com/mod/thdilos-fox-origin)

---
<details>
<summary>If you are using these origins in a server...</summary>
 
Since these Origins are **seldomly or never tested in a server environment** (by me)\
They are highly likely to be **more overpowered** than other origins.

</details>

---

## Evolution Origins

**You can also find the unlocking criteria in the advancement tab**

**Once unlocked, you can transform freely among the unlocked ones, by pressing [Load Toolbar Activator], default X**

<details><summary>Lightning Fox</summary>

![Lightning Fox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CbsRGXBx/images/0972a59ef0d1deb0fb4ffafb9301a4c2a89f0d5b.png)

<details><summary>Unlocking</summary>Struck by lightning has a 1% chance(s) to unlock</details></details>

<details><summary>Fire Fox</summary>
  
![Fire Fox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CbsRGXBx/images/2c80424f463775190b8a787927277e3ed3b24936.png)
  
<details><summary>Unlocking</summary>Complete all 21 nether advancement (Excluding the hardest 2 about effects)</details></details>

<details><summary>Ice Fox</summary>

![Ice Fox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CbsRGXBx/images/49e0f103391b3cf3d48ea213d01f640ef00867c7.png)
<details><summary>Unlocking</summary>Visit all 9 Vanilla Biomes with "frozen", "snow" and "ice" in its name<details><summary>Biomes List</summary>		
        "frozen_river",
		"snowy_plains",
		"ice_spikes",
		"frozen_peaks",
    	"snowy_slopes",
		"snowy_taiga",
		"snowy_beach",
		"frozen_ocean",
		"deep_frozen_ocean"</details></details></details>

(The below 2 cannot be unlocked after unlocking the other one)

<details><summary>Kitsune</summary>

![Kitsune](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CbsRGXBx/images/6ec190812e14d91b26a13e69204c0b67c3e3020c.png)

<details><summary>Unlocking</summary>Karma reaches +200%</details></details>


<details><summary>Ninetails</summary>
  
![Ninetails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CbsRGXBx/images/771164dcaf4319ad3849f9fc952386e7dd5fb42a.png)
<details><summary>Unlocking</summary>Karma reaches -200%</details></details>


<details>
<summary>About the Karma System for Kitsune and Ninetails</summary>

1. Every 24000 ticks of surviving while Karma < 50% -> Karma Magnitude + 20%. When under moon, the tick will run at 5 times faster
2. Every undead mob killed -> Karma Magnitude + 0.5%
3. Every Boss mobs (Ender Dragon / Wither / Warden) killed -> Karma Magnitude + 20%
4. Every other mob killed -> Karma - 0.5%
5. Every Tamed mob (Pets) killed -> Karma - 20%
6. Every golden food ate -> Karma + 1%
7. Tame mobs -> Karma + 10% 
8. Every mob bred -> Karma + 2%
9. Every time the player dies -> Karma reset to 0

</details>

---
Check the wiki for detailed explanations of every skills and mechanics
